name: Battle in the Skies (BITS)
description: Aerial battles — offered with no apologies to Mike Carr, creator of Fight in the Skies — resolve firing and melee by CHAINMAIL. Play on hex or staggered-square boards at least 48 × 48 with paper counters (6' × 6' for figures), height tracked by numbered counters in 1" increments. Orders are written for simultaneous movement: direction, length, altitude change only — firing at turn's end is always allowed unless meleed.
external_refs: credit: Fight in the Skies (Mike Carr)
